---
name: Drift case report / 漂移案例报告 (most valuable!)
about: Where Aperture MCP tripped, missed, or false-flagged on your real decision docs / Aperture MCP 在你真实决策文档上触发、漏报或误报的地方
title: "[case] "
labels: ["drift-case"]
---

The single most useful thing you can send us. Real cases keep the limits honest, grow the corpus, and
tell us which blind spot to fix next.
你能发给我们的最有用的东西。真实案例让局限保持诚实、让语料成长,并指引我们下一个先补哪个盲区。

### What happened? / 发生了什么?

- [ ] ✅ It **tripped** on a real dropped commitment that mattered / 在一条真正要紧的被删承诺上**触发**了
- [ ] ❌ It **missed** a real drift — a reworded / softened / paraphrased commitment / **漏掉**了真实漂移(改写 / 软化 / 转述)
- [ ] ⚠️ It **false-flagged** a translation / reformat / **误报**了(翻译 / 重排版)
- [ ] 🤔 Noise / unclear — 噪声 / 不清楚

### The commitment you were watching / 你在追踪的那条承诺

`<the watchlist token / watchlist 里的 token>`

### What changed between the two versions / 两个版本之间改了什么

How did it change? (deleted verbatim / reworded / softened / translated / number changed)
它是怎么变的?(逐字删除 / 改写 / 软化 / 翻译 / 改了数字)

### The wording (optional) / 措辞(可选)

> ⚠️ **This crosses the metadata boundary.** Paste real text only if you choose to — the wording *is*
> the test, so it can't be meaningfully anonymized. Skip this section freely.
> ⚠️ **这会跨过元数据界线。** 只在你愿意时才贴真实文本——措辞*本身*就是测试,无法有意义地匿名化。
> 不填也完全可以。

```
state_a (earlier / 较早):

state_b (later / 较晚):
```

### Anything else / 其它

Context, what you expected, what would have made it more useful.
背景、你的预期、怎样会更有用。
